headline: Domino's Targets Tournament Surge While Lifting Dividend And Cash Returns
summary: Domino's Pizza (NasdaqGS:DPZ) has launched a "Best Deal Ever" promotion tied to basketball tournament season, targeting fans during a peak ordering period. The company has also announced a significant dividend increase, signaling an emphasis on shareholder payouts. Together, the promotion and higher dividend point to a dual focus on customer engagement and capital returns. As one of the largest pizza delivery chains globally, Domino's sits at the intersection of quick service dining and...
